---
title: "pressR trial report"
output: html_document
params:
  trial: NULL
  masks: NULL
  thresholds: NULL
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5)
library(pressR)
```

```{r}
trial <- params$trial
```

## Trial

```{r}
print(trial)
```

## Summary

```{r}
pr_summary(trial)
```

## Maximum pressure picture

```{r}
pr_plot_heatmap(trial)
```

## Dynamics

```{r}
pr_plot_force_time(trial)
```
